text:
File. Researchers who received CCW data 
from 2006–2013 and wish to identify the NCPDP_ID associated with the CCW_PHARM_ID may request 
the “Pharmacy Bridge File,” which is designed for this purpose. 

Investigators who wish to obtain Pharmacy Characteristics files must choose between the pharmacy 
IDs on the PDE (variable called the service provider ID [SRVC_PRVDR_ID]), or the proprietary 
NCPDP_ID that will allow linkage between the PDE and Pharmacy Characteristics Files. 

The NCPDP_ID
